name: shop_coin_packs
description: Six tiers of the SAME gold coin: a glossy golden coin with an embossed five-point star and darker gold rim. Tiers: single coin; small tied pouch spilling star coins; neat tall stack of star coins; open wooden chest brimming ONLY with star coins; wooden cart heaped with star coins; huge gleaming pile of star coins.
prompt_extra: every cell repeats the identical star coin design; ONLY star coins appear — no gems, no jewels, no other treasure; only quantity and staging grow per tier
